titlestmt.titleproper: History of medicine reprints and publications
History of medicine reprints and publications
titlestmt.author: Kelly A. Perry

publicationstmt.publisher: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday October 13, 2025 at 22:00

did.unittitle: History of medicine reprints and publications

corpname.part: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

did.abstract: The collection includes reprints of journal articles and small publications on topics related to the history of medicine. The collection was created by library staff from materials transferred to the Medical Historical Library at an unknown date. Many of the materials in Series I. John F. Fulton reprints include markings and/or correspondence indicating they were owned by John Farquar Fulton (1899–1960). Materials in Series II. Mixed reprints include markings and/or correspondence from multiple people affiliated with the Yale School of Medicine and the Medical Historical Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The collection was created by the Medical Historical Library. Provenance for individual items in the collection is unknown.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: History of medicine reprints and publications. Historical Library, Harvey Cushing / John Hay Whitney Medical Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes reprints of journal articles and small publications on topics related to the history of medicine. The collection was created by library staff from materials transferred to the Medical Historical Library at an unknown date. Many of the materials in Series I. John F. Fulton reprints include markings and/or correspondence indicating they were owned by John Farquar Fulton (1899–1960). Materials in Series II. Mixed reprints include markings and/or correspondence from multiple people affiliated with the Yale School of Medicine and the Medical Historical Library.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Many items in this series include stamp marks, annotations, memoranda, and/or correspondence indicating they belonged to John Farquar Fulton. They were transferred to the Medical Historical Library at an unknown date.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Many items in this series include stamp marks, annotations, memoranda, and/or correspondence indicating they belonged to John Farquar Fulton or others associated with the Yale School of Medicine or the Cushing/Whitney Medical Historical Library. They were transferred to the Medical Historical Library at an unknown date.
